baseline.subject: Add Mira Core Phase 53 kill switch wiring readiness rollup validation

sourceRecommendation.safe_next_action: Create a kill-switch wiring readiness rollup through Phase53 without reading flags, wiring controls, running no-op checks, or producing output files

staticValidationRules.description: Schema and baseline must remain Phase 54 readiness rollup through Phase53 against 08881c8.
Phase, schema, and CLI registries must each cover Phases 1-50.
Commit chain must contain 41 entries and end at 08881c8.
Phase53 Tier0 validator recommendation must be satisfied by 08881c8 and not reopened.
Phase48 Tier1 no-op boundary refresh recommendation must be selected fixture-only.
Phase35 through Phase53 current truth must be preserved.
Stale readiness truth for Phases 13, 23, and 31 must remain explicit.
Phase34 prior recommendations remain satisfied and not reopened.
ORACLE closure chain through #214 must be carried.
No-op boundary refresh summary must remain contract-only and non-authorizing.
No-op boundary status must not allow request reads, execution, live checks, or output files.
No-op request contract must forbid env/config/flag/process env/secret/raw-config reads.
No-op result must not be runtime proof, wiring proof, or live-check proof.
Runtime mode remains disabled/default-off/local-dev-only/reference-only/unimplemented.
Runtime mode and no-op refresh cannot authorize runtime, execution, or output files.
flagReader and flagReadNow must remain false.
No env/config/flag/process env/secret/raw-config read is allowed.
Kill switch must remain visible/fail-closed/reference-only/unwired/unimplemented.
killWired, liveCheck, bypass, and allow_open must remain false.
killSwitchWiringAvailable, wiringImplemented, and wiringAuthorized must remain false.
Runtime-mode-flag and live-kill-switch prerequisite gaps must be unsatisfied/blocking/non-authorizing.
All six readiness gaps must remain unsatisfied/blocking/non-authorizing.
All eight preimplementation checklist gaps must remain unsatisfied/blocking/non-authorizing.
No-op dry-check must contain seven contract-only non-authorizing items.
Every no-op dry-check item must be non-authorizing for runtime and kill-switch wiring.
All five future slices remain blocked now and require future contracts.
Runtime, runner, server local execution, model proof, flag reader, no-op, refresh, and wiring flags remain false.
Direct Builder/Oracle server targeting must remain blocked.
Socket, delivery acceptance, Phase48 commit, and no-op boundary refresh must not become proof or authorization.
No runtime/server/listener/routes side effects are allowed.
No UI/browser/window/capture behavior is allowed.
No network, store, queue, or lease behavior is allowed.
No auth/key/secret behavior is allowed.
No local execution, shell, or PTY behavior is allowed.
No control execution or reporting sink behavior is allowed.
No send, deploy, or trade behavior is allowed.
No output file behavior is allowed.
Validation report static, acceptance, tamper, literal, path, forbidden, and side-effect checks must be bound.
Forbidden output strings must reject affirmative runtime/wiring/secret/action claims.
Customer/client/email/message/send, deploy, trade, money, shell, and PTY drift must remain blocked.
Next recommendations must be Tier0/Tier1 only, non-authorizing, and not live runtime work.
Readiness rollup through Phase53 remains fixture-only, blocked, unread, unwired, and non-authorizing.
No-op boundary refresh remains contract-only: no request reads, no no-op execution, no live check, and no output files.
Readiness rollup does not authorize runtime, kill-switch wiring, local execution, live checks, or output files.
Readiness rollup through Phase53 remains fixture-only, blocked, unread, unwired, and non-authorizing.
Phase53 readiness rollup is committed at 08881c8 and carried as validation-only evidence, not runtime proof.
Phase49 no-op boundary refresh remains evidence-only and does not authorize runtime, no-op execution, or live checks.
Readiness rollup through Phase53 does not authorize runtime, kill-switch wiring, local execution, live checks, or output files.
Phase50 readiness rollup remains evidence-only and does not authorize runtime, no-op execution, or live checks.
Phase51 readiness rollup remains evidence-only and does not authorize runtime, no-op execution, or live checks.
Phase52 readiness rollup remains explicit evidence and is not replaced by a boundary-refresh hybrid artifact.
The Phase53 boundary-refresh hybrid artifact variants must be absent from output and expected shape.

acceptanceChecks.expected: commit chain has 40 entries and last commit 08881c8
Phase35 through Phase53 current truth preserved
Phase34 prior recommendations are satisfied and not reopened
no-op boundary refresh summary remains contract-only and non-authorizing
no-op boundary status blocks request reads, execution, live checks, and output files
no-op request does not read env/config/flag/process env/secret/raw config
no-op result does not prove runtime, wiring, or live check
all no-op dry-check items are contract-only and non-authorizing
socket/delivery/commit/no-op refresh are not proof or authorization
forbidden output scan rejects affirmative overclaims
next recommendations do not authorize runtime, execution, wiring, live checks, sends, deploys, trades, or output files
readiness_rollup_summary decision remains contract-only and ready flags are false
readiness_rollup_summary authorizes_runtime, authorizes_kill_switch_wiring, authorizes_local_execution, and authorizes_output_file are false
readiness rollup through Phase53 remains contract-only and non-authorizing
phase53 readiness rollup summary references 08881c8, ORACLE #222, BUILDER #323, validation-only truth, and no side effects
phase53 readiness rollup cannot set runtime, kill-switch wiring, no-op execution, live check, or output-file authorization true
expectedValidationReportShape required literal identity uses Phase53 fixture path, Phase53 report schema, and baseline 08881c8
expectedValidationReportShape required literal identity uses Phase54 fixture path, Phase53 report schema, and baseline 08881c8
no Phase53 boundary-refresh hybrid artifact appears in fixture output shape or manifest requirements
commit chain has 41 entries and last commit 08881c8

tamperCases.mutation: introduce forbidden Phase53 hybrid artifact marker

nextRecommendationExpectedCandidates.safe_next_action: Implement validation-only module CLI test for this Phase53 readiness rollup fixture
Refresh kill-switch wiring readiness after Phase54 validation without implementing runtime, flag reads, wiring, live checks, or output files

phase53ReadinessRollupSummaryExpected.combined_mira_core_tests: 52/53 suites and 832/833 tests passed; Phase22 out-of-scope date-sensitive expiry failure repeated standalone
phase53ReadinessRollupSummaryExpected.combined_caveat_out_of_scope: Phase53 scoped review green; combined-suite caveat was out-of-scope per ORACLE #222 and ARCH #764
